ogTitle: Goughs Bay vs Gowanbrae: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goughs Bay and Gowanbrae.
heading: Goughs Bay vs Gowanbrae — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goughs Bay, Victoria and Gowanbrae, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gowanbrae has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Goughs Bay (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goughs Bay or Gowanbrae safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goughs Bay has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Gowanbrae scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goughs Bay scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Gowanbrae scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goughs Bay or Gowanbrae?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gowanbrae has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
